texto: It’s too dangerous…I would never be able to forgive myself if something happened to him. I wouldn’t be able to bare it. Forgiveness would be out of the question
autor: beyond my ability. I would never be able to forget that the boy I loved was hurt…or worse…because he came to this world. Because of me.
explicacao: Citação de beyond my ability. I would never be able to forget that the boy I loved was hurt…or worse…because he came to this world. Because of me. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “It’s too dangerous…I would never be able to forgive myself if something happened to him.
